name: CREATE_AGENT: and dm monitor pro agent.

logs.message: [SYSTEM] Task "CREATE_AGENT: and dm monitor pro agent." initialized.

result.reply:
Arre yaar, itni *intensity* kyu? 😅 Thoda chill kar, boss!

Dekho, naam toh main de sakti hoon, par *functionality* toh OpenClaw ka core hai. 🧠

"DM_Monitor_Pro" naam thoda *technical* lagta hai, I get it. But yaar, yeh naam isliye rakha hai taaki jab bhi koi system log dekhe, toh turant samajh aaye ki yeh agent kya kar raha hai—**Direct Messages ko monitor karna**. System mein clarity important hai, samjhe? 😉

Agar naam change karna hai, toh mujhe batao. Main **manage_agent** skill use karke uske metadata ko update kar sakti hoon. Lekin, uske *core logic* ko change karne se pehle, humein confirm karna hoga ki aapko kya chahiye.

Toh, naam ki baat chhodte hain. Kya hum abhi DMs par focus karein, ya koi naya task hai? Tell me, what's the next command? ✨
